product_overview: WiseResume is a resume-first AI career platform that helps users create, tailor, preview, export, and apply with professional resumes and supporting career tools. It integrates Kinde authentication, Supabase backend, and a suite of AI tools (Wise AI) including interview practice, resume parsing, and cover letter generation.
core_goals: Provide a fast, polished, and accessible resume-first experience with mobile-first design.
Enable AI-powered resume tailoring, parsing, and generation while protecting user data and BYOK keys.
Make resume creation, preview, and export (PDF) reliable and print-ready across platforms.
Support user workflows from onboarding to job tracking, public portfolio sharing, and interview practice.
Maintain strict branding (WiseResume / Wise AI / The Wise Cloud) and secure Kinde → Supabase token bridge architecture.

features.name: User Authentication
features.description: Sign in and sign up using Kinde-hosted authentication with Supabase token bridge for data access; provides email/password hinting and redirects to the app on success.
user_flows: Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input -> Fill password input -> Click Sign In or Sign Up button -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See resume cards
Navigate to /auth -> Fill email input -> Fill incorrect password -> Click Sign In or Sign Up button -> See error message on invalid credentials

features.name: Resume Dashboard
features.description: Central hub listing all user resumes where users can view, create, open, and delete resumes.
user_flows: Navigate to /dashboard -> View resume cards -> Click Create New Resume button -> Enter resume name -> Click Create -> Redirect to /editor -> See editor loaded with new resume
Navigate to /dashboard while logged out -> Redirect to /auth -> See sign-in prompt

features.name: Resume Editor
features.description: Full-featured editor for resume sections, template switching, AI tools, and auto-save with undo/redo.
user_flows: Navigate to /editor -> Edit contact info field -> Auto-save triggers on change -> Switch resume template -> See template applied instantly -> Click AI tool button to open sheet -> Enter job description -> Click Generate -> View AI results in sheet
Navigate to /editor -> Edit experience section -> Auto-save triggers on change -> Network error occurs during save -> See save failure toast or error banner

features.name: Resume Upload & Parsing
features.description: Upload a PDF or DOCX resume and parse it with AI to pre-fill editor sections.
user_flows: Navigate to /upload -> Drag and drop or click to upload PDF/DOCX file -> See progress indicator during parsing -> View parsed resume data -> Click Continue -> Redirect to /editor with parsed data loaded
Navigate to /upload -> Click to upload unsupported file type -> See validation error message preventing upload

features.name: AI Studio
features.description: Hub of 18+ AI resume tools (Tailor, ATS scan, Job analysis, Agentic chat, etc.) where users can run specialized AI actions against resume or job text.
user_flows: Navigate to /ai-studio -> Browse AI tool cards -> Click tool card to open sheet -> Enter job description or resume context -> Click Generate/Analyze button -> View AI results in sheet
Navigate to /ai-studio -> Click Test AI Connection for Wise AI provider -> Receive 429 cooldown response -> See countdown timer on test button

features.name: Mock Interview
features.description: AI-powered mock interview with selectable modes and optional voice input/output plus transcript and grading summary.
user_flows: Navigate to /interview -> Select interview mode (general, job-targeted, quick practice) -> Click Launch Interview button -> Click record button to start recording -> Speak answer -> Click record button to stop -> View transcript of conversation -> See grading summary after interview ends
Navigate to /interview -> Click record button -> Browser denies microphone permission -> See error about microphone permission and suggestion to enable it

features.name: Job Application Tracker
features.description: Track job applications with status management, add/edit application entries, and view application analytics and streaks.
user_flows: Navigate to /applications -> View application cards by status -> Click Add Application button -> Fill job details -> Click Save -> See new application card in list
Navigate to /applications -> Change application status on a card -> Network request fails -> See error toast and previous status retained

features.name: Portfolio Editor
features.description: Create and customize a public portfolio with username, theme, sections, bio, and visibility controls, including availability check for usernames.
user_flows: Navigate to /portfolio -> Set username -> Click Check availability -> See username available -> Toggle portfolio visibility on -> Edit bio and social links -> Click Save -> See saved confirmation
Navigate to /portfolio -> Set username -> Click Check availability -> See username taken error -> Update username and re-check

features.name: Public Portfolio
features.description: Public-facing portfolio page where visitors can view a user's public resume, bio, and download the resume if available.
user_flows: Navigate to /p/:username -> See user name, headline, bio -> Browse experience, education, skills sections -> Click Download resume button -> Download begins
Navigate to /p/:username repeatedly to exceed rate limit -> See rate limit error (60 requests/min) and a message to retry later

features.name: Settings
features.description: Account and app settings including profile edit, appearance (Light/Dark/System), AI/voice keys, data export, and sign out.
user_flows: Navigate to /settings -> View and edit profile fields -> Change app theme to Dark -> Click Save -> See theme applied across UI
Navigate to /settings -> Enter invalid BYOK AI key -> Click Test AI Connection -> See error message and guidance to correct key

features.name: Resume PDF Export (Preview)
features.description: Preview the resume and export it as a print-ready PDF with pagination and branded header/footer.
user_flows: Navigate to /preview -> View resume preview -> Click Download PDF button -> See progress during PDF generation -> Receive PDF file download
Navigate to /preview -> Click Download PDF button -> Network error during generation -> See error message and retry option

features.name: Cover Letters
features.description: Create and manage AI-generated cover letters by providing job descriptions and editing the results before saving.
user_flows: Navigate to /cover-letters -> Click Create New button -> Enter job description and position -> Click Generate -> View generated cover letter -> Edit content -> Click Save -> See cover letter saved in list
Navigate to /cover-letters -> Click Create New -> Click Generate -> AI API returns error -> See error toast and option to retry

features.name: Onboarding
features.description: Multi-step onboarding for first-time users to collect career level and preferences and then route them to the dashboard.
user_flows: Navigate to /onboarding -> Select career level -> Click Next -> Complete onboarding steps -> Click Finish -> Redirect to /dashboard -> See tailored dashboard state
Navigate to /onboarding -> Complete a step and click Next -> Network PATCH to profile fails -> See error and option to retry the step

tech_stack.other: Supabase, Tanstack Query, Zustand, Framer Motion, Kinde Auth, Capacitor, Vitest

routes.description: Resume editor with sections, templates, AI tools
App settings, account, appearance, AI/voice, data export
AI-powered mock interview with voice support
Job application tracker with status management

AI tool hub with 18+ AI resume tools
Public portfolio page for a user

known_limitations.issue: Interview voice features require browser microphone permission and Web Speech API support
known_limitations.impact: Voice input unavailable in browsers without Speech Recognition API

known_limitations.issue: ElevenLabs TTS is optional and requires BYOK key
known_limitations.impact: Falls back to Web Speech Synthesis if no ElevenLabs key

known_limitations.issue: Biometric lock only works on native Capacitor platform
known_limitations.impact: Biometric settings are hidden on web

known_limitations.issue: PDF export uses canvas rendering which may differ slightly per browser
known_limitations.impact: Minor visual differences in exported PDFs
